rule_constraint.label: Rule Constraint
rule_constraint.description: Constrains how a setting rule, artifact, power, or system behaves.

knowledge_gate.label: Knowledge Gate
knowledge_gate.description: Controls who knows a fact and when.

status_change.label: Status Change
status_change.description: Defines a character, object, faction, or location state after a story change.

relationship_state.label: Relationship State
relationship_state.description: Defines an active relationship state that affects behavior.

behavior_constraint.label: Behavior Constraint
behavior_constraint.description: Constrains characterization, faction behavior, or scene behavior.

event_anchor.label: Event Anchor
event_anchor.description: Marks a major story event that changes Context or state.

objective.label: Objective
objective.description: Defines an active character or faction goal.

location_state.label: Location State
location_state.description: Defines a location condition during a Context window.

faction_state.label: Faction State
faction_state.description: Defines a faction, realm, or organization state during a Context window.
